Interface AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository

All Superinterfaces:
ChatMemoryRepository
All Known Implementing Classes:
RedisChatMemoryRepository
public interface AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository extends ChatMemoryRepository
Redis-specific extended interface for ChatMemoryRepository with advanced query capabilities.

This interface provides Redis Search-specific functionality and serves as inspiration for potential future evolution of the core ChatMemoryRepository interface. Other database implementations may provide similar capabilities through vendor-specific extensions.

Note that the executeQuery method uses Redis Search syntax, which is specific to Redis implementations and not portable across different storage backends.

Since:
2.0.0
Author:
Brian Sam-Bodden

    AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation
    A wrapper class to return messages with their conversation context.

  • Method Details

    • findByContent

      List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> findByContent(String contentPattern, int limit)
      Find messages by content across all conversations.
      Parameters:
      contentPattern - The text pattern to search for in message content
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages matching the pattern

    • findByType

      List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> findByType(MessageType messageType, int limit)
      Find messages by type across all conversations.
      Parameters:
      messageType - The message type to filter by
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages of the specified type

    • findByTimeRange

      List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> findByTimeRange(String conversationId, Instant fromTime, Instant toTime, int limit)
      Find messages by timestamp range.
      Parameters:
      conversationId - Optional conversation ID to filter by (null for all conversations)
      fromTime - Start of time range (inclusive)
      toTime - End of time range (inclusive)
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages within the time range

    • findByMetadata

      List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> findByMetadata(String metadataKey, Object metadataValue, int limit)
      Find messages with a specific metadata key-value pair.
      Parameters:
      metadataKey - The metadata key to search for
      metadataValue - The metadata value to match
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages with matching metadata

    • executeQuery

      List<AdvancedRedisChatMemoryRepository.MessageWithConversation> executeQuery(String query, int limit)
      Execute a custom query using Redis Search syntax.
      Parameters:
      query - The Redis Search query string
      limit - Maximum number of results to return
      Returns:
      List of messages matching the query
